name: Ceviche
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs mixed seafood, including firm fish, clams, shrimp (or any available seafood)
Lime juice to cover the ingredients
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and cut the mixed seafood into small pieces.
2. Place the seafood in a bowl and add thinly sliced onion, chopped parsley, celery ribs, serrano chiles, salt, pepper, and enough lime juice to cover all ingredients.
3. Refrigerate the mixture for at least two hours to allow the flavors to meld and the seafood to "cook" through the acidity of the lime juice.
4. Serve the ceviche with arroz con pollo made with beer and lots of cilantro.
